api_types.name: LLMModelSpec
api_types.doc: LLMModelSpec defines the model source and its characteristics.

fields.name: URI
fields.doc: URI of the model, specifying its location, e.g., hf://meta-llama/Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E-Instruct The storage-initializer init container uses this URI to download the model.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name is the name of the model as it will be set in the "model" parameter for an incoming request. If omitted, it will default to `metadata.name`. For LoRA adapters, this field is required.

fields.name: Criticality
fields.doc: Criticality defines how important it is to serve the model compared to other models. This is used by the Inference Gateway scheduler.

fields.name: LoRA
fields.doc: LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) adapters configurations. Allows for specifying one or more LoRA adapters to be applied to the base model.

api_types.name: LoRASpec
api_types.doc: LoRASpec defines the configuration for LoRA adapters.

fields.name: Adapters
fields.doc: Adapters is the static specification for one or more LoRA adapters. Each adapter is defined by its own ModelSpec. This type is recursive https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/controller-tools/issues/585

api_types.name: RouterSpec
api_types.doc: RouterSpec defines the routing configuration for exposing the service. It supports Kubernetes Ingress and the Gateway API. The fields are mutually exclusive.

fields.name: Route
fields.doc: Route configuration for the Gateway API. If an empty object `{}` is provided, the controller creates and manages a new HTTPRoute.

fields.name: Gateway
fields.doc: Gateway configuration for the Gateway API, mutually exclusive with Ingress. If an empty object `{}` is provided, the controller uses a default Gateway. This must be used in conjunction with the 'Route' field for managed Gateway API resources.

fields.name: Ingress
fields.doc: Ingress configuration. This is mutually exclusive with Route and Gateway. If an empty object `{}` is provided, the controller creates and manages a default Ingress resource.

fields.name: Scheduler
fields.doc: Scheduler configuration for the Inference Gateway extension. If this field is non-empty, an InferenceModel resource will be created to integrate with the gateway's scheduler.

api_types.name: GatewayRoutesSpec
api_types.doc: GatewayRoutesSpec defines the configuration for a Gateway API route.

fields.name: HTTP
fields.doc: HTTP route configuration.

api_types.name: HTTPRouteSpec
api_types.doc: HTTPRouteSpec defines configurations for a Gateway API HTTPRoute. 'Spec' and 'Refs' are mutually exclusive and determine whether the route is managed by the controller or user-managed.

fields.name: Refs
fields.doc: Refs provides references to existing, user-managed HTTPRoute objects ("Bring Your Own" route). The controller will validate the existence of these routes but will not modify them.

fields.name: Spec
fields.doc: Spec allows for providing a custom specification for an HTTPRoute. If provided, the controller will create and manage an HTTPRoute with this specification.

api_types.name: GatewaySpec
api_types.doc: GatewaySpec defines the configuration for a Gateway API Gateway.

fields.name: Refs
fields.doc: Refs provides references to existing, user-managed Gateway objects ("Bring Your Own" gateway). The controller will use the specified Gateway instead of creating one.

api_types.name: IngressSpec
api_types.doc: IngressSpec defines the configuration for a Kubernetes Ingress.

fields.name: Refs
fields.doc: Refs provides a reference to an existing, user-managed Ingress object ("Bring Your Own" ingress). The controller will not create an Ingress but will use the referenced one to populate status URLs.

api_types.name: SchedulerSpec
api_types.doc: SchedulerSpec defines the Inference Gateway extension configuration. The SchedulerSpec configures the connection from the Gateway to the model deployment leveraging the LLM optimized request Scheduler, also known as the Endpoint Picker (EPP) which determines the exact pod that should handle the request and responds back to Envoy with the target pod, Envoy will then forward the request to the chosen pod. The Scheduler is only effective when having multiple inference pod replicas. Step 1: Gateway (Envoy) <-- ExtProc --> EPP (select the optimal replica to handle the request) Step 2: Gateway (Envoy) <-- forward request --> Inference Pod X

fields.name: Pool
fields.doc: Pool configuration for the InferencePool, which is part of the Inference Gateway extension.

fields.name: Template
fields.doc: Template for the Inference Gateway Extension pod spec. This configures the Endpoint Picker (EPP) Deployment.

api_types.name: InferencePoolSpec
api_types.doc: InferencePoolSpec defines the configuration for an InferencePool. 'Spec' and 'Ref' are mutually exclusive.

fields.name: Spec
fields.doc: Spec defines an inline InferencePool specification.

fields.name: Ref
fields.doc: Ref is a reference to an existing InferencePool.

api_types.name: ParallelismSpec
api_types.doc: ParallelismSpec defines the parallelism parameters for distributed inference.

fields.name: Tensor
fields.doc: Tensor parallelism size.

fields.name: Pipeline
fields.doc: Pipeline parallelism size.

fields.name: Data
fields.doc: Data parallelism size.

fields.name: DataLocal
fields.doc: DataLocal data local parallelism size.

fields.name: DataRPCPort
fields.doc: DataRPCPort is the data parallelism RPC port.

fields.name: Expert
fields.doc: Expert enables expert parallelism.

api_types.name: UntypedObjectReference
api_types.doc: UntypedObjectReference is a reference to an object without a specific Group/Version/Kind. It's used for referencing networking resources like Gateways and Ingresses where the exact type might be inferred or is not strictly required by this controller.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name of the referenced object.

fields.name: Namespace
fields.doc: Namespace of the referenced object.

api_types.name: LLMInferenceServiceStatus
api_types.doc: LLMInferenceServiceStatus defines the observed state of LLMInferenceService.

fields.name: URL
fields.doc: URL of the publicly exposed service.

fields.name: Status
fields.doc: Conditions of the resource.

fields.name: AddressStatus
fields.doc: Addressable endpoint for the service, including cluster-local URLs.

api_types.name: LLMInferenceServiceList
api_types.doc: LLMInferenceServiceList is the list type for LLMInferenceService. +k8s:openapi-gen=true

api_types.name: LLMInferenceServiceConfigList
api_types.doc: LLMInferenceServiceConfigList is the list type for LLMInferenceServiceConfig. +k8s:openapi-gen=true

api_types.name: LLMInferenceService
api_types.doc: LLMInferenceService is the Schema for the llminferenceservices API, representing a single LLM deployment. It orchestrates the creation of underlying Kubernetes resources like Deployments and Services, and configures networking for exposing the model. +k8s:openapi-gen=true

api_types.name: LLMInferenceServiceConfig
api_types.doc: LLMInferenceServiceConfig is the Schema for the llminferenceserviceconfigs API. It acts as a template to provide base configurations that can be inherited by multiple LLMInferenceService instances. +k8s:openapi-gen=true

api_types.name: LLMInferenceServiceSpec
api_types.doc: LLMInferenceServiceSpec defines the desired state of LLMInferenceService.

fields.name: Model
fields.doc: Model specification, including its URI, potential LoRA adapters, and storage details. It's optional for `LLMInferenceServiceConfig` kind.

fields.name: WorkloadSpec
fields.doc: WorkloadSpec configurations for the primary inference deployment. In a standard setup, this defines the main model server deployment. In a disaggregated setup (when 'prefill' is specified), this configures the 'decode' workload.

fields.name: Router
fields.doc: Router configuration for how the service is exposed. This section dictates the creation and management of networking resources like Ingress or Gateway API objects (HTTPRoute, Gateway).

fields.name: Prefill
fields.doc: Prefill configuration for disaggregated serving. When this section is included, the controller creates a separate deployment for prompt processing (prefill) in addition to the main 'decode' deployment, inspired by the llm-d architecture. This allows for independent scaling and hardware allocation for prefill and decode steps.

fields.name: BaseRefs
fields.doc: BaseRefs allows inheriting and overriding configurations from one or more LLMInferenceServiceConfig instances. The controller merges these base configurations, with the current LLMInferenceService spec taking the highest precedence. When multiple baseRefs are provided, the last one in the list overrides previous ones.

api_types.name: WorkloadSpec
api_types.doc: WorkloadSpec defines the configuration for a deployment workload, such as replicas and pod specifications.

fields.name: Replicas
fields.doc: Number of replicas for the deployment.

fields.name: Parallelism
fields.doc: Parallelism configurations for the runtime, such as tensor and pipeline parallelism. These values are used to configure the underlying inference runtime (e.g., vLLM).

fields.name: Template
fields.doc: Template for the main pod spec. In a multi-node deployment, this configures the "head" or "master" pod. In a disaggregated deployment, this configures the "decode" pod if it's the top-level template, or the "prefill" pod if it's within the Prefill block.

fields.name: Worker
fields.doc: Worker configuration for multi-node deployments. The presence of this field triggers the creation of a multi-node (distributed) setup. This spec defines the configuration for the worker pods, while the main 'Template' field defines the head pod. The controller is responsible for enabling discovery between head and worker pods.

api_types.name: LocalModelCacheSpec
api_types.doc: LocalModelCacheSpec +k8s:openapi-gen=true

fields.name: SourceModelUri
fields.doc: Original StorageUri

fields.name: ModelSize
fields.doc: Model size to make sure it does not exceed the disk space reserved for local models. The limit is defined on the NodeGroup.

fields.name: NodeGroups
fields.doc: group of nodes to cache the model on. Todo: support more than 1 node groups

api_types.name: LocalModelCache
api_types.doc: LocalModelCache +k8s:openapi-gen=true +genclient

api_types.name: LocalModelCacheList
api_types.doc: LocalModelCacheList +k8s:openapi-gen=true

api_types.name: LocalModelNodeGroupSpec
api_types.doc: LocalModelNodeGroupSpec defines a group of nodes for to download the model to. +k8s:openapi-gen=true

fields.name: StorageLimit
fields.doc: Max storage size per node in this node group

fields.name: PersistentVolumeSpec
fields.doc: Used to create PersistentVolumes for downloading models and in inference service namespaces

fields.name: PersistentVolumeClaimSpec
fields.doc: Used to create PersistentVolumeClaims for download and in inference service namespaces

api_types.name: LocalModelNodeGroup
api_types.doc: +k8s:openapi-gen=true +genclient

api_types.name: LocalModelNodeGroupList
api_types.doc: +k8s:openapi-gen=true

fields.name: SourceModelUri
fields.doc: Original StorageUri

fields.name: ModelName
fields.doc: Model name. Used as the subdirectory name to store this model on local file system

api_types.name: LocalModelNodeSpec
api_types.doc: +k8s:openapi-gen=true

fields.name: LocalModels
fields.doc: List of model source URI and their names

api_types.name: LocalModelNode
api_types.doc: +k8s:openapi-gen=true +genclient

api_types.name: LocalModelNodeList
api_types.doc: +k8s:openapi-gen=true

api_types.name: ServingRuntimeSpec
api_types.doc: ServingRuntimeSpec defines the desired state of ServingRuntime. This spec is currently provisional and are subject to change as details regarding single-model serving and multi-model serving are hammered out. +k8s:openapi-gen=true

fields.name: SupportedModelFormats
fields.doc: Model formats and version supported by this runtime

fields.name: MultiModel
fields.doc: Whether this ServingRuntime is intended for multi-model usage or not.

fields.name: Disabled
fields.doc: Set to true to disable use of this runtime

fields.name: ProtocolVersions
fields.doc: Supported protocol versions (i.e. v1 or v2 or grpc-v1 or grpc-v2)

fields.name: WorkerSpec
fields.doc: Set WorkerSpec to enable multi-node/multi-gpu

fields.name: GrpcMultiModelManagementEndpoint
fields.doc: Grpc endpoint for internal model-management (implementing mmesh.ModelRuntime gRPC service) Assumed to be single-model runtime if omitted

fields.name: GrpcDataEndpoint
fields.doc: Grpc endpoint for inferencing

fields.name: HTTPDataEndpoint
fields.doc: HTTP endpoint for inferencing

fields.name: Replicas
fields.doc: Configure the number of replicas in the Deployment generated by this ServingRuntime If specified, this overrides the podsPerRuntime configuration value

fields.name: StorageHelper
fields.doc: Configuration for this runtime's use of the storage helper (model puller) It is enabled unless explicitly disabled

fields.name: BuiltInAdapter
fields.doc: Provide the details about built-in runtime adapter

api_types.name: BuiltInAdapter
api_types.doc: +k8s:openapi-gen=true

fields.name: ServerType
fields.doc: ServerType must be one of the supported built-in types such as "triton" or "mlserver", and the runtime's container must have the same name

fields.name: RuntimeManagementPort
fields.doc: Port which the runtime server listens for model management requests

fields.name: MemBufferBytes
fields.doc: Fixed memory overhead to subtract from runtime container's memory allocation to determine model capacity

fields.name: ModelLoadingTimeoutMillis
fields.doc: Timeout for model loading operations in milliseconds

fields.name: Env
fields.doc: Environment variables used to control other aspects of the built-in adapter's behaviour (uncommon)

api_types.name: ServingRuntime
api_types.doc: ServingRuntime is the Schema for the servingruntimes API +k8s:openapi-gen=true +genclient

api_types.name: ServingRuntimeList
api_types.doc: ServingRuntimeList contains a list of ServingRuntime +k8s:openapi-gen=true

api_types.name: ClusterServingRuntime
api_types.doc: ClusterServingRuntime is the Schema for the servingruntimes API +k8s:openapi-gen=true +genclient

api_types.name: ClusterServingRuntimeList
api_types.doc: ClusterServingRuntimeList contains a list of ServingRuntime +k8s:openapi-gen=true

api_types.name: WorkerSpec
api_types.doc: WorkerSpec is the schema for multi-node/multi-GPU feature

fields.name: PipelineParallelSize
fields.doc: PipelineParallelSize defines the number of parallel workers. It specifies the number of model partitions across multiple devices, allowing large models to be split and processed concurrently across these partitions It also represents the number of replicas in the worker set, where each worker set serves as a scaling unit.

fields.name: TensorParallelSize
fields.doc: TensorParallelSize specifies the number of GPUs to be used per node. It indicates the degree of parallelism for tensor computations across the available GPUs.

api_types.name: SupportedModelFormat
api_types.doc: +k8s:openapi-gen=true

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name of the model format.

fields.name: Version
fields.doc: Version of the model format. Used in validating that a predictor is supported by a runtime. Can be "major", "major.minor" or "major.minor.patch".

fields.name: AutoSelect
fields.doc: Set to true to allow the ServingRuntime to be used for automatic model placement if this model format is specified with no explicit runtime.

fields.name: Priority
fields.doc: Priority of this serving runtime for auto selection. This is used to select the serving runtime if more than one serving runtime supports the same model format. The value should be greater than zero.  The higher the value, the higher the priority. Priority is not considered if AutoSelect is either false or not specified. Priority can be overridden by specifying the runtime in the InferenceService.

api_types.name: StorageHelper
api_types.doc: +k8s:openapi-gen=true

api_types.name: ServingRuntimePodSpec
api_types.doc: +k8s:openapi-gen=true

fields.name: Containers
fields.doc: List of containers belonging to the pod. Containers cannot currently be added or removed. There must be at least one container in a Pod. Cannot be updated. +patchMergeKey=name +patchStrategy=merge

fields.name: Volumes
fields.doc: List of volumes that can be mounted by containers belonging to the pod. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes +patchMergeKey=name +patchStrategy=merge,retainKeys

fields.name: NodeSelector
fields.doc: NodeSelector is a selector which must be true for the pod to fit on a node. Selector which must match a node's labels for the pod to be scheduled on that node. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/assign-pod-node/

fields.name: Affinity
fields.doc: If specified, the pod's scheduling constraints

fields.name: Tolerations
fields.doc: If specified, the pod's tolerations.

fields.name: Labels
fields.doc: Labels that will be add to the pod. More info: http://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/labels

fields.name: Annotations
fields.doc: Annotations that will be add to the pod. More info: http://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/annotations

fields.name: ImagePullSecrets
fields.doc: ImagePullSecrets is an optional list of references to secrets in the same namespace to use for pulling any of the images used by this PodSpec. If specified, these secrets will be passed to individual puller implementations for them to use. For example, in the case of docker, only DockerConfig type secrets are honored. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/images#specifying-imagepullsecrets-on-a-pod +patchMergeKey=name +patchStrategy=merge

fields.name: HostIPC
fields.doc: Use the host's ipc namespace. Optional: Default to false. +k8s:conversion-gen=false

api_types.name: StorageContainerSpec
api_types.doc: StorageContainerSpec defines the container spec for the storage initializer init container, and the protocols it supports. +k8s:openapi-gen=true

fields.name: Container
fields.doc: Container spec for the storage initializer init container

fields.name: SupportedUriFormats
fields.doc: List of URI formats that this container supports

api_types.name: SupportedUriFormat
api_types.doc: SupportedUriFormat can be either prefix or regex. Todo: Add validation that only one of them is set. +k8s:openapi-gen=true

status_conditions.type: Inference Service \"%s\" is not ready. Trained Model \"%s\" cannot deploy
Inference Service \"%s\" memory resources are not available. Trained Model \"%s\" cannot deploy

summary: kserve is a Kubernetes component. managing 11 CRD(s): ClusterServingRuntime, ClusterStorageContainer, InferenceGraph, InferenceService, LLMInferenceServiceConfig, LLMInferenceService, LocalModelCache, LocalModelNodeGroup, LocalModelNode, ServingRuntime, TrainedModel. deploying 2 workload(s) (kserve-controller-manager, kserve-localmodel-controller-manager) with 2 container(s). watching 28 resource type(s). exposing 3 service(s). with 10 webhook(s) (8 validating, 2 mutating). protected by 1 network policy/policies. connecting to external services: azure-blob, gcs. defining 19 API spec type(s) across 42 struct(s) with 141 total fields. following 8 reconciliation steps across 5 controller(s). reporting 32 status condition types. with 6 ingress route(s).
